mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member( memberno, mname, id, passwd, passwd2, nickname, profile, birthdate, gender, zipcode, address1, address2, tel, guardian_name, guardian_relationship, guardian_email, guardian_phone, guardian2_name, guardian2_relationship, guardian2_email, guardian2_phone, point ) VALUES ( member_seq.nextval, #{mname}, #{id}, #{passwd}, #{passwd2}, #{nickname}, #{profile}, #{birthdate}, #{gender}, #{zipcode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, #{tel}, #{guardian_name}, #{guardian_relationship}, #{guardian_email}, #{guardian_phone}, #{guardian2_name}, #{guardian2_relationship}, #{guardian2_email}, #{guardian2_phone}, #{point} )
mapper.select: SELECT memberno, name, email, password, nickname, profile, birthdate, gender, address, phone, guardian_name, guardian_relationship, guardian_email, guardian_phone, guardian2_name, guardian2_relationship, guardian2_email, guardian2_phone, login_time, logout_time, point FROM member WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE id = #{id} AND passwd = #{passwd}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT memberno, id, mname, tel, address1, mdate, grade FROM member ORDER BY memberno DESC
